surface.text: A {{vehicle}} sits half-submerged at the edge of a flooded street. The cargo hatch is just above the waterline, rusted but intact.

cargo_bay.text: Inside the tilted cargo bay, waterlogged crates line the walls. Most are ruined, but a sealed container in the corner looks promising.

choices.label: Dive below the waterline to reach the driver's cab.

drivers_cab.text: The cab is fully submerged but sealed. A locked glovebox and a portable radio mount sit undisturbed. Whoever drove this last didn't come back for their things.

sharp_metal.text: The hatch edge tears across your palm as it gives way.

submersion.text: You misjudge the depth. Water floods your lungs before you surface, coughing hard.
